account.title: Account
account.becomeProDesc: Want to offer your services? Join as a professional and start receiving job requests.
account.becomeProSuccess: Welcome! Let's set up your professional profile.
account.becomeProError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

security.title: Security
security.tooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.newMessagesDesc: Email me when I receive a new message
notifications.jobMatchesDesc: Email me when a job matches my services
notifications.quotesDesc: Email me when a professional sends a quote
notifications.confirmReEnableDesc: You'll start receiving these alerts again. You can turn them off at any time.
notifications.browserDesc: Get pop-up alerts when a new message arrives — even if the tab is in the background. Works like WhatsApp Web.
notifications.browserBlocked: Your browser has blocked notifications for this site. To fix this:
notifications.browserBlockedStep1: Click the lock/info icon in the address bar
notifications.browserGranted: You'll receive pop-up alerts when someone messages you, even when this tab is in the background.
notifications.browserHowItWorksDesc: Keep a tab open with Constructive Solutions in the background. When a new message arrives, you'll see a notification pop-up, hear a sound, and can click it to go straight to the conversation.
